title: Product Pricing Term And Condition
description:
The complete framework that explains how a banking product is priced (rates, fees, charges) and under what contractual terms it is provided to the customer.

This covers the monetary aspects of the banking product, such as:

Interest rate / profit rate (fixed, floating, or tiered).
Fees and charges (processing fee, annual fee, penalty charges, prepayment charges, etc.).
Exchange rates (for forex-related products).
Discounts, rebates, or incentives (if applicable).
Repayment schedule and installment amounts (for loans).

ProductPricingTermAndConditionType.description: In banking, Product Pricing Terms and Conditions (T&Cs) can be classified into several types, depending on the product and how pricing is structured.

x-relationships.description: Inherits from Product Term And Condition
